name: Crockpot Beef and Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried pinto beans in water overnight.
2. Brown the salt pork in a skillet until crispy.
3. Drain and rinse the soaked beans, then combine them with the cold water in the crockpot.
4. Add the browned salt pork and remaining ingredients (onion, garlic, tomato paste, chili powder, salt, cumin seed, and marjoram) to the crockpot.
5. Cover and cook on low for 9-10 hours.
